subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! A letter was received from thee, and divine fragrances were inhaled therefrom, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مکتوبی از آنجناب وارد و نفحات قدس از آن استشمام شد زیرا در
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
